trigger: Texas homeowners need systems that can withstand multi-day grid failures during extreme temperature drops.
California homeowners face aggressive utility rate hikes and constant rolling brownouts during fire season.
Florida homeowners need hurricane-rated solar infrastructure that can survive 150mph winds and massive storm surges.
New York's aging grid infrastructure leaves homeowners highly vulnerable during heavy winter snowfall and ice storms.
North Carolina's unpredictable coastal weather requires heavy-duty battery backups that kick in the second the lines go down.
